items.text: Preparation — Verify all required information is completed in the ticket
Data Backup — Advise user to backup data to OneDrive. For dead machines, recover files if possible
Verify Installed Applications — Export software list from Lansweeper, send to user, flag unapproved software
Hardware Validation — Verify device model, RAM, SSD size, and condition match the order
Physical Check — Power on and verify screen, keyboard, touchpad, and ports
Create Computer Account — Run 'Create Computer Account' script from IT Tools folder on desktop
Image Laptop — Set BIOS password to pssit25, then image the laptop per SCCM Image Deployment Guide
AD Move / GP Update — Move to correct OU, login as adm, set sleep to Never (plugged in), run gpupdate /force, reboot
Connect to Guest Wi-Fi — Connect, reboot to verify login, confirm DA / ZN / AoVPN works
Install Company Software — Verify all PSS-supported practice apps per Combined PC Build Checklist
Install Practice-Specific Software — MGALFA, Python, Excel Add-Ins, etc. per Combined PC Build Checklist
Schedule/Apply Patches — Create Qualys job per New PC Qualys Job procedure; run Commercial Vantage Lenovo updates
BitLocker Encryption — Confirm enabled and recovery key is backed up in Active Directory
MessageSave Settings Restore — Follow 'MessageSave – Restore User Settings' procedure
Verify Local Admin Setup — Confirm 'Corp IT' local admin account configured per policy
Verify Proper Software Installed — Confirm all required software is present
Device Manager Review — Verify no device errors or missing drivers
Confirm DirectAccess / Zero Network / Zscaler — All three verified working
Account Setup — New user: sign in as user. Existing user: hand off / start Bomgar session if remote
Okta Verify Setup — Verify Okta Verify desktop app and Intune certificate; enroll user
Defender / Antivirus Check — Verify Microsoft Defender or TrendMicro is active and up to date
Verify Lansweeper Entry — Validate new laptop details collected; update LS Agent group if needed
Outlook Configuration — Follow 'Outlook – New User Setup' procedure
Log In to Key Applications — Okta, Outlook, Teams, OneDrive
Regional Settings — Verify time zone, keyboard layout, and language preferences
Validate Printer — Verify printers installed/mapped correctly
Philly Users Only — Add NAC Groups (email chichd@milliman.com), disable credential guard, reboot
Post-Onboarding Review — Add 1-week follow-up reminder to verify system performance and access
Receive Old Laptop + Decom Form — Confirm old laptop returned, submit PSS Device Decommission form
Ticket Closure — Verify all items complete, close ticket
